mission.title: score: [BUG] resources.limits.memory regex rejects valid values like 1.5Gi and larger unit suffixes
mission.description: [BUG] resources.limits.memory regex rejects valid values like 1.5Gi and larger unit suffixes. Community-reported issue.

steps.title: Identify score troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your score installation:
```bash
score-compose version
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review score configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant score configuration:
The memory pattern in the schema is:
`^[1-9]\d*(K|M|G|T|Ki|Mi|Gi|Ti)?$`
https://github.com/score-spec/spec/blob/main/score-v1b1.json#L185
A couple of things slip through here that I don't think were intended:

- Decimal values like `1.5Gi`, `0.5G`,

steps.title: Apply the fix for [BUG] resources.limits.memory regex rejects valid values…
steps.description:
Updates the `resourcesLimits.memory` pattern in `score-v1b1.json` so it accepts the memory values Kubernetes already accepts.

Today the pattern rejects `1.5Gi`, `0.5G`, `2.5M`, `1Pi`, and `2Ei` even though `kubectl apply` takes all of them without complaint. After this change those values
```yaml
containers:
  main:
    image: my-app
    resources:
      limits:
        memory: "1.5Gi"
```

steps.title: Confirm [BUG] resources.limits.memory regex rejects valid… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test score to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
Updates the `resourcesLimits.memory` pattern in `score-v1b1.json` so it accepts the memory values Kubernetes already accepts.

Today the pattern rejects `1.5Gi`, `0.5G`, `2.5M`, `1Pi`, and `2Ei` even though `kubectl apply` takes all of them without complaint. After this change those values validate.
codeSnippets:
containers:
  main:
    image: my-app
    resources:
      limits:
        memory: "1.5Gi"

<quantity>        ::= <signedNumber><suffix>
<digit>           ::= 0 | 1 | ... | 9
<digits>          ::= <digit> | <digit><digits>
<number>          ::= <digits> | <digits>.<digits> | <digits>. | .<digits>
<sign>            ::= "+" | "-"
<signedNumber>    ::= <number> | <sign><number>
<suffix>          ::= <binarySI> | <decimalExponent> | <decimalSI>
<binarySI>        ::= Ki | Mi | Gi | Ti | Pi | Ei
<decimalSI>       ::= m | "" | k | M | G | T | P | E
<decimalExponent> ::= "e" <signedNumber> | "E" <signedNumber>

prerequisites.description: A working score installation or development environment.
